product_overview: Vibestream is a web-based live TV and IPTV streaming platform that lets users browse channel directories and watch live streams in the browser. It provides category-based navigation, real-time search, and a split-screen player experience for selecting and switching channels.
core_goals: Browse live TV channels by category
Search for channels by name or ID
Open and watch a selected channel stream
Switch between channel categories while watching
Navigate directly to individual channel playback pages

features.name: Channel Explorer Directory
features.description: Allows users to explore the channel catalog, narrow results with search, and open a channel to start streaming.
user_flows: Navigate to /watch -> View the full channel directory -> Type a search query -> See the filtered channel list -> Open a channel to start playback
Navigate to /watch -> View category counts -> Select a category filter -> See channels update for that category -> Open a channel card to watch the stream

features.name: Streaming Video Player
features.description: Lets users watch a live channel, switch categories, and change streams within the player layout.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the live player layout -> Select a category tab -> See the channel list update -> Choose a channel -> Watch the stream load and play
Navigate to /watch/:id -> View the dedicated channel playback page -> Select a different category tab -> Choose another channel -> See the stream switch to the new channel
Navigate to / -> View the player -> Start interacting with the page -> Hear audio become available after the first interaction -> Continue watching the live stream

routes.description: Live stream video player and channel selector homepage
Channel directory explore page with search and category filtering
Streaming playback page for a specific TV channel by slug or ID
JSON API endpoint to fetch list of categories and TV channels
JSON API endpoint to fetch latest sports headlines from RSS feeds

features.name: Channel Explorer Directory
features.description: Real-time channel search and filter by category
user_interactions: Type query in the search input field to filter channels
View channel count for each category
Click channel card to go to play the stream

features.name: Streaming Video Player
features.description: Watch live TV channel streams with category tabs
user_interactions: Click tab buttons to switch between categories in the sidebar
Click channel buttons to load and switch streams
View error overlay and click Retry button if a stream fails to load

known_limitations.issue: Video playback stream might fail if local proxy is not running or streams are offline
known_limitations.impact: Displays error card overlay with Stream Load Failed message
